titleStmt.title: SII 36.109: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 109. (A.R. No. 109 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: The inscription records an iṟaiyili gift of six mā of land as nundāviḷakkup-puram for maintaining one perpetual lamp by Dēvaragaṇḍm alias Rājarāja Paṉaiyur-nāṭṭu Muvendavelan, a native of Chiruvēḷūr and seven others to the temple. The land was purchased for a sale price of 3 kācus and for exempting taxes on it an additional amount of 17 kācus were made by the doners. A long list of signatories appear at the end of the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
....§ svastiśrī pūmaṉnu patumam pūtta veḻulaku tāmun ceytavattāl pariti vaḻit tonṟi nac cuṭarmuṭi cūṭi Irunilamakaḷaiyuṟimaiyiṟ puṇarntu tirumakaḷ mārvam paruvarai nikarppac ceyamakaḷ ceḻuntan can=tanaccuvaṭṭāl puyumiru kayilaip poruppenat tonṟi nāmakaḷtānu meṅkomakan cevvāyp pavaḷac ceyoḷi paṭait tanniyānenat tavaḷanan niṟaivakait tuṭai
yenenap pukaḻ makiḻcintai makiḻnāḷinumoru kuṭai nilavu porupaṭait tikiri veyilenak karuṅkaliyiruḷi naitturappa nīṭupallūḻi yeḻkaṭaṟ puṟattinum koṭātta nic ce vānuyar ponneṭu meruviṟ pulivīṟṟiruppa Umpariyānaiyo reṭṭinukkum tampamennat tanittani ticaitoṟum vicaiyastampam niṟpa paci pakaiyātiyānatu nīṅki mannuyir taḻaippa maṉuvāṟu viḷaṅka mātavar tavaḻum
maṅkayar kaṟpum Ātiyantaṇarāhutikkanalumīteḻa koṇṭal vicu taṇpunalum metini vaḷamum cātiyoḻukkamum paravi naṟpirappum paṇaikkaimāvumallatu vanṟaḷaippaṭutal kanavilum ṭavani vāḻap pallavar teliṅkar māḷavar kaliṅkar kocalar kannaṭar kaṭārar tennar coḷar ciṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar tirikatar vaṅkāraṅkar mattar mattirar Enṟaṟaikaḻal ventarumallāvaraicarum muṟai tiṟai kuṇanti
ṟaiñcavum ponmalaṟkoṭi cempiyankiḻānaṭi Orumaruṅkuṭanamarntiruppac cempon vīrasimhāsanattup puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirāja[ kecari paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ [śrī ku] lottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1 patinonṟāvatu tanu nāyaṟṟu Iraṇṭāntiyatiyum canikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcatti nāḷ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Irumuṭi ṭaya ciṟuve
ḷūruṭaiyāṉ tevarkaṇṭanāna rācarācap panaiyūr nāṭṭu mūventaveḷānum veḷānātittatevanum Āṭavallān ponnamutanum Āṭavallān cāyakkāṭu tevanum llān cokkanum Ātittaṉ Aḻakiyatevanum Ātittan tirumākāḷamuṭaiyānum Ivvanaivom In
caṇṭecuvara tevarkanmikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilattukku kīḻpāṟkellai tirumākāḷamu meṟkum tenpāṟkellai karuṅkaṇṇi nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai It nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭa pāṟkellai Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāna Ivvirumuṭicoḻa nallūr nilattukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunānkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa Innila
kuṭuttu Innilattukku vilaittiravviyam kācu mūnṟum Iṟaittiravviyam kācu patineḻum Āka kācu 2 10 Ikkācu Irupatum Ik koyilil kumpiṭṭu Irukkum tapasyaril ceramān perumāḷ nāṅ koṇṭu Innilam Āṟumāvum Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttu Innilattāl vanta peruvari cilvariyuṭpaṭa maṟṟum tiruvācalālponta kuṭimaikaḷum Ivvirumuṭicoḻa nallūr Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyā tile Ēṟṟi
vomāka sammatittu Ikkācu Irupatum vilaittiravyamum Iṟaittiravyamum Āka kaikkoṇṭu Innilam Āṟumāvum Ittevarkkut tirununtāviḷakkuppuṟamāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār koyilil Āticaṇṭecuvara tevar kanmikaḷukku ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān veḷān tevarkaṇṭanāna rācarācap panaiyūr nāṭṭu mūventaveḷānum veḷānātitta tevanum Āṭavallā
n pontamutanum Āṭavallān cāyakkāṭu tevanum Āṭavallān tirumākāḷamuṭaiyānum Āṭavallān cokkanum Ātittanaḻakiyatevanum Ātittan tirumākāḷamuṭaiyānum Ivvanaivom Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutinen veṭkovan ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān tillaiyaḻakaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān ponnamutan tevarkaṇṭanāna panaiyūr nāṭṭu mūventa
veḷāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān veḷānātittatevaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ātittan tirumākāḷamuṭaiyāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟu veḷūruṭaiyān Āṭavallān ponnamutaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān Āṭavallān tirumākāḷamuṭaiyāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān Āṭavallān cāyakkāṭu te
vaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān veḷān ponnamutaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyāṉ Aātittan tillaināyakanen Ivai Eneḻuttu Ivai Akaḷaṅkan vetta venṉāḻiyeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai veḷūrun ponnamutan Āti tāḻiyāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaḷātittaneḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān Āṭavallān � ṉ centaneḻu Ippaṭi vai ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān Ātittan Aḻakiya teva kāṇikkuṭaiyān cci muṭaiyān māteva neḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 36.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
